analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet honors Martin Luther King Jr. for advancing social justice and equality and encourages community service to honor his legacy. Evaluation by narrative: US1 (The US has an honorable tradition) – Supported: it invokes a revered historical figure and frames the pursuit of unalienable rights, social justice, and equality as part of the American legacy. US2 (The US has an admirable society) – Partially relevant but not primary: it highlights civic virtue (serving communities) and celebrates a prominent civil society leader; this promotes the admirable qualities of American society. US3 (hostile enemies) – Not present. US4 (force for good) – Indirectly related, but the tweet is domestically focused on civil rights history and service, not on broader US efforts for global good; not sufficiently supported. US5 (great international ally) – Not present. US6 (at the forefront) – Not present. Conclusion: The tweet promotes US1 and US2.
